predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second (deceased) person.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves relatives in the ascending line.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased person leaves close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: asset_in_common_estate
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common matrimonial estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: asset_in_undivided_estate_between_spouses
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the estate held exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses of the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_in_own_estate
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the own (separate) estate of the deceased person.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.24 with respect to the deceased.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion as referred to in article 4.25 with respect to the deceased.

predicates.name: deed_or_will_excludes_usufruct_on_reversion_asset
predicates.description: The deed of gift or testament provides otherwise regarding usufruct on the reversion asset for the surviving spouse of the deceased.

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_ascendants_or_close_collaterals
predicates.description: The deceased leaves relatives in the ascending line or close collateral relatives.

predicates.name: asset_in_common_or_undivided_estate
predicates.description: The asset belongs to the common estate or the estate held exclusively in undivided co-ownership between the spouses.

predicates.name: asset_subject_to_legal_reversion
predicates.description: The asset is subject to the right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or 4.25.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_full_ownership
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires full ownership of the asset as a legal consequence of succession.

predicates.name: surviving_spouse_acquires_usufruct
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires usufruct over the asset as a legal consequence of succession.
